title: ACTION OF p-TOLUENE-SULPHONYL CHLORIDE ON POLYNITRO-OXY- DIPHENYLS
author: A. B. SEN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The action of  p -toluene-salphonyl chloride on 3 : 5-dinitro-4-oxydiphenyl and 3 :5  : 4'-trinitro -4-oxydiphenyl has been examined. 

 In each case a chloro compound has been obtained in the presence of diethylaniline as the condens­ing reagent. 3 : 5-Dinitro-4-oxydiphenyl forms also a  p -toluene-sulphonite in the presence of sodium carbonate as the condensing reagent. 

 The action of various amines and amino compounds on these chloro compounds has also been studied.

 The action of various amines and amino compounds on these chloro compounds has also been studied.
